_meta.note: Demo-mode snapshot of the user's GL filter scope. Same shape the agent returns: reconciliationFilter (the universe of allowed values) + validation.

validation.tooltip:
This indicator is red if the roll forward from the prior period fails.
This is most likely due to one or more un-posted GL batches.
If all batches in the prior period have been posted, please contact us at rrsupport@getgsi.com for assistance.
